overdue_followups.jobTitle: Vice President of Sales, North America

questions.answer:
No meetings scheduled for today.

**Pipeline (open opportunities): 5 open deals (product total $19,190 | weighted total $12,649)**
- Largest: **Benzl Opp** — $14,100 (weighted $9,165), **65%**, stage **Negotiation**, est. close **April 1, 2024** (Daryl, Industrial Drive Service Inc.)
- **Lubs Opportunity** — $2,250 (weighted $1,800), **80%**, stage **Commitment to Buy**, est. close **March 31, 2024** (Michael Kadlub, Keystroke - Toronto)
- **Shannon Opportunity** — $2,000 (weighted $1,600), **80%**, stage **Commitment to Buy**, est. close **March 31, 2024**
- **Contact Us 25 April 2024 - Fajar Chandra** — $840 (weighted $84), **10%**, stage **Initial Communication**, est. close **May 10, 2024**
- **Another test** — $0 (weighted $0), **9%**, stage **Enquired about product availability**, est. close **October 24, 2024**

**Overdue follow-ups: 5 contacts**
- Brian Selmeski (Fairmont State University) | Craig Lewis (Focusrite) | Melissa Pearce (CH TechONE) | Trevor Warren (Office Move Pro) | Mark Seidenfeld (bcinetworks.com)

**Recent activity highlights**
- New opportunity created: **Nicki project** on **October 15, 2025**
- Quote activity: **“Test quote” viewed and accepted** on **May 22, 2025** (Betty Browser, CH TechONE - Sales)
questions.action:
1. Call Daryl at Industrial Drive Service Inc. about Benzl Opp negotiation status and next steps today  
2. Email Michael Kadlub at Keystroke - Toronto to confirm signature timeline for Lubs Opportunity by end of day today  
3. Contact Brian Selmeski at Fairmont State University to complete the overdue follow-up today  
4. Review and update the Another test opportunity amount and next activity, and schedule a follow-up by tomorrow
questions.answer_guidance: Data: today_meetings[] (each with meeting{} from calendar.items, contacts[] with full details, history[] for those contacts, opportunities[] linked via contacts.companyID), recent_history[], open_opportunities[], overdue_followups[] (contacts missing lastAttempt or > 7 days). Show for each meeting: time, subject, attendee names, recent history summary, linked opportunities.
questions.action_guidance: If today_meetings has meetings with contacts[]: 1) WHO: Extract contacts[0].fullName and contacts[0].emailAddress from today_meetings[0], 2) WHAT: draft pre-meeting email referencing history[0].details if available, confirming the meeting and asking about agenda priorities, 3) WHEN: send at least 1 hour before meeting.startTime. Include: subject line, greeting, body, sign-off. FALLBACK: If no meetings with contacts, use overdue_followups[0]: extract fullName and emailAddress, draft check-in email. Log outreach as History in Act!.

fetched_data.duckdb: GROUP BY period; SUM weighted; calc days_overdue; JOIN contacts for primary

questions.answer: Forecast health is **poor**: there are **0 deals** forecasted in the next **30/60/90 days** (weighted **$0** in each window), while **100.0%** of the weighted pipeline is in **slipped/overdue** deals. Total open pipeline is **$20,905.00** with total weighted **$13,134.25**, driven by slipped opportunities like **Benzl Opp** (weighted **$9,165.00**, estimated close **April 1, 2024**, **675** days overdue) and **Lubs Opportunity** (weighted **$1,800.00**, estimated close **March 31, 2024**, **676** days overdue).
questions.action:
1. Assign sales ops to review Benzl Opp and update stage and close date by end of day tomorrow  
2. Have the account owner call the Benzl Opp primary contact to confirm next steps within 48 hours  
3. Have the account owner contact Lubs Opportunity stakeholders to re-forecast or close-lost by Friday  
4. Schedule a pipeline cleanup meeting with the sales team to address all slipped/overdue deals within 7 days
questions.answer_guidance: Data: forecast_30d/60d/90d (each with deals[], weighted, count), slipped_deals[] sorted by value with _days_overdue, _primary_contact{name, email, phone}, beyond_90d_count (deals > 90 days out), no_date_count (opps missing close date), total_pipeline, total_weighted (all dated opps including >90d). Show: forecast by period, slipped deals needing attention, note beyond_90d_count and no_date_count.
questions.action_guidance: For slipped_deals[0] (highest value, most urgent): 1) WHO: _primary_contact.name with _primary_contact.phone or email. FALLBACK: If _primary_contact is null, use contactNames or assign deal owner to identify stakeholder, 2) WHAT: urgent call to reconfirm close date - ask about blockers and timeline. After call: update estimatedCloseDate in Act! and log call as History, 3) WHEN: call TODAY - deal is _days_overdue days past expected close. ALSO: If no_date_count > 0, note that X deals need estimatedCloseDate populated for accurate forecasting.

questions.question: At-risk deals

fetched_data.duckdb: filter risk; JOIN history(contacts+companies); ORDER BY severity

questions.answer:
There are **10 at-risk deals**, all flagged **Overdue** (manager: **Ken Quigley**).

- **Largest:** Benzl Opp — **$14,100**, **65%**, closes **April 1, 2024**, stage **Negotiation**, **675 days overdue** (in stage **1415 days**)
- **Most overdue:** Lubs Opportunity — **$2,250**, **80%**, closes **March 31, 2024**, stage **Commitment to Buy**, **676 days overdue** (in stage **1415 days**)
- **Other at-risk deals:** Shannon Opportunity (**$2,000**, closes **March 31, 2024**, **676 days overdue**); Act! Web API Test / CH Gourmet Imports (**$500**, closes **November 27, 2024**, last touch **August 14, 2024**); name your quote / Smith Co. (**$540**, closes **December 1, 2024**); plus 5 deals at **$0** value (Quote, Quote Sample 004, Contact Us 07 December 2024 - ken, Another test, and one more) all overdue **410–469 days**.
questions.action:
1. Assign Ken Quigley to call Benzl Opp primary contact and set recovery plan meeting by Feb 7, 2026.  
2. Have Ken Quigley email Lubs Opportunity stakeholders for status confirmation and revised close date by Feb 7, 2026.  
3. Task Ken Quigley to update stages, probabilities, and next steps for all 10 Overdue deals by Feb 9, 2026.  
4. Ask Ken Quigley to close or revalue the five $0 deals (Quote, Quote Sample 004, Contact Us 07 December 2024 - ken, Another test, and one more) by Feb 9, 2026.
questions.answer_guidance: Data: at_risk_deals[] with name, company (from opp.companies[0] or contact.company fallback), value, probability, risk_reason (Stalled/Overdue/Low-activity), days_in_stage, last_touch (via contacts.companyID), primary_contact{name, email, phone}. Sorted by severity (Overdue first). Show: deal name, company, value, risk_reason, days_in_stage, last_touch, primary contact.
questions.action_guidance: For at_risk_deals[0] (highest severity): 1) WHO: Extract primary_contact.name and primary_contact.phone or primary_contact.email from the deal. FALLBACK: If primary_contact is null, create task: 'Identify stakeholder for [deal name]' assigned to manager, 2) WHAT: recovery action based on risk_reason - Stalled: schedule alignment call; Overdue: reconfirm timeline and update estimatedCloseDate; Low-activity: reach out referencing last_touch. Log as History in Act!, 3) WHEN: take action TODAY - at-risk deals need immediate attention.

questions.question: Account momentum

fetched_data.duckdb: GROUP BY company; SUM pipeline; JOIN contacts for top_contact; sort reactivate by staleness

questions.answer:
Account momentum is **low overall**: 1 **SAVE** account with recent-ish activity and 2 **RE-ACTIVATE** accounts that are very stale.

- **SAVE:** CH TechONE - Sales — pipeline **$120.0** | last touch **May 22, 2025** (**259** days) | top contact: **Betty Browser** (bbrowser@CHTechONE.email, 2125552485)
- **RE-ACTIVATE:** Golf Greens Extraordinaire — pipeline **$0** | last touch **September 19, 2023** (**870** days) | top contact: **data not available**
- **RE-ACTIVATE:** Wuwu Inc — pipeline **$0** | last touch **July 30, 2024** (**555** days) | top contact: **Ida Afrin** (spankt@aol.com, 4164444444)
questions.action:
1. Call Betty Browser at CH TechONE - Sales to schedule a pipeline update meeting by Feb 9, 2026.  
2. Email Ida Afrin at Wuwu Inc to confirm current needs and set a reactivation call by Feb 9, 2026.  
3. Assign a rep to research and add a primary contact for Golf Greens Extraordinaire in Act! by Feb 7, 2026.
questions.answer_guidance: Data: expand[], save[], reactivate[] - each company with name, id, pipeline (sum of opps via contacts.companyID), eng30 (engagement last 30 days via history.contacts.companyID), last (last touch), last_touch_days, category, top_contact{name, email, phone} (most recently engaged). Show: categorized company lists with pipeline value, engagement metrics, and top contact.
questions.action_guidance: For save[0] (highest pipeline at churn risk): 1) WHO: Extract top_contact.name, top_contact.phone or top_contact.email, and company name from save[0]. FALLBACK: If top_contact is null, create task: 'Identify stakeholder at [company name] via LinkedIn', 2) WHAT: proactive check-in call - acknowledge it's been last_touch_days days since contact, ask about current priorities and concerns. Log call as History in Act!, 3) WHEN: schedule call within 3 business days - declining engagement signals churn risk.

questions.question: Relationship gaps

relationship_analysis.opp: APC Web quote for Charlotte Bailey

fetched_data.duckdb: COUNT engaged; flag single_threaded; find dark_contacts (sorted by staleness)

questions.answer:
All 10 opportunities show relationship gaps: **0 engaged contacts** and **all are single-threaded**.

**Largest at-risk (no engagement):**
- Benzl Opp — $14,100 (company data not available)
- Lubs Opportunity (Keystroke - Toronto) — $2,250
- Shannon Opportunity — $2,000 (company data not available)

**Dark / stale contacts found (needs re-engagement):**
- Betty Browser (CH TechONE - Sales) — Sales Representative; last reach **May 22, 2025** via Email (bbrowser@CHTechONE.email, 2125552485)
questions.action:
1. Assign owner to add two additional stakeholder contacts to Benzl Opp by Feb 9, 2026  
2. Schedule discovery call with key decision-maker at Keystroke - Toronto for Lubs Opportunity by Feb 12, 2026  
3. Email Betty Browser at CH TechONE - Sales to re-engage and book a follow-up call by Feb 7, 2026  
4. Update Shannon Opportunity with at least one engaged contact and log next-step activity by Feb 9, 2026
questions.answer_guidance: Data: relationship_analysis[] with opp (deal name), company (from opp.companies or contact.company), value, engaged (count), single_threaded (bool), dark_contacts[] sorted by staleness (null lastReach first) with name, title, lastReach, channel, email, phone. Sorted by single_threaded first, then value desc. Show: deals with engagement count, single-threaded flag, and dark contacts prioritized by staleness.
questions.action_guidance: For first single_threaded deal in relationship_analysis[]: 1) WHO: Extract from dark_contacts[0]: state the contact's name, their title, and include their email (dark_contacts[0].email) or phone (dark_contacts[0].phone). FALLBACK: If dark_contacts is empty or all have channel='None', create task: 'Research [company] stakeholders on LinkedIn', 2) WHAT: draft email/call script to multi-thread - greet by name, introduce yourself, reference the opp name and company, ask about their priorities. After outreach: log as History in Act! linked to contact and opportunity, 3) WHEN: complete outreach within 3 business days - single-threaded = high risk.
